Elantra > Body and Frame > Construction > Material Specification

CONSTRUCTION MATERIALS — REAR QUARTER PANEL
Hyundai Elantra 2023

MATERIAL SPECIFICATIONS
Quarter panel outer skin:      High Strength Steel (HSS) 270 MPa tensile strength
Quarter inner reinforcement:   Mild steel 270 MPa yield strength
D-pillar inner:                Ultra High Strength Steel (UHSS) 980 MPa tensile strength
Roof rail reinforcement:       Advanced High Strength Steel (AHSS) 590 MPa

STEEL GRADES BY COMPONENT
Component                | Material Type | Tensile Strength | Steel Grade
Quarter panel outer      | HSS           | 270 MPa          | CR270
Quarter inner            | Mild steel    | 270 MPa          | CR270
D-pillar inner           | UHSS          | 980 MPa          | CR980
Roof rail                | AHSS          | 590 MPa          | CR590

MATERIAL HANDLING NOTES
Do not apply heat above 150 degrees C to UHSS components.
Bake hardening steel properties may be altered by excessive heat.
Dual-phase steel requires specific weld schedule per material specification.
Boron steel components must not be sectioned outside approved cut locations.

Hyundai material specifications are subject to model-year revision.
